title: empty Space/set patch {} on non-existent space returns updated
description: Trigger: Space/set update with empty patch {} for a space_id that does not exist. Phase 1 finds no validation errors; Phase 2 calls update_space_fully(id, None, None, &[]). The function skips the existence check, does nothing, commits, returns Ok(true). space_set records updated[space_id]=null. RFC 8620 §7.1: notFound required. Same root cause as the member-only case — fix there covers this too.
